Video.summary: The plaintiff says his ex-partner's lazy work ethic caused their business to flounder and is suing the defendant for breach of contract; a woman says her mother's boyfriend borrowed her car, fell asleep at the wheel, and totaled it.
Video.title: Sunk by Sloth

Video.summary: John must answer for his severe smoking addiction after his girlfriend, Debbie, issues him an ultimatum.
Video.title: Goodman vs. McDonnell

Video.summary: First, the plaintiff says friend skipped out on their lease. Then, man alleges ex stole his jewelry.
Video.title: Skipping Out

Video.summary: First, business owner claims the defendant failed to pay him. Then, plaintiff is suing for a plane ticket.
Video.title: Cleaning House

Video.summary: A woman says her son-in-law stole money out of her deceased daughter's bank account; a plaintiff contends that as soon as he broke things off with the defendant, she stole his identity.
Video.title: Grave Robbing

Video.summary: A couple say their ex-landlord rented them a property under false pretenses and misled them about amenities and utility costs, so they should not have to pay any fees; a man contends that his former friend forgave a $300 loan when he lost his job.
Video.title: Everything Is Not Included

Video.summary: A man who owes $5,000 in unpaid rent says he threw a fundraising party to raise the money and owes nothing; a woman says her sister agreed to pay off a vehicle loan and an electric bill, but the defendant says she never wanted the vehicle.
Video.title: Rent Raiser

Video.summary: First, an alleged hit and run. Then, a plaintiff claims the defendant left house in shambles.
Video.title: In Shambles

Video.summary: First, a man sues estranged friend for an unpaid loan. Then, couple is suing for an unfinished remodeling job.
Video.title: Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room

Image.alt: Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room
Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room
Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room

Video.summary: A woman sues for $5,000 because, she says, a dog charged her and caused her to fall and break her wrist; a woman wants a tattoo artist to return her money for services not rendered.
Video.title: It's All in the Wrist

Video.summary: First, a friendship is strained over money. Then, the plaintiff wants her money back from friend.
Video.title: The Root of All Evil

Video.summary: First, plaintiff sues for property damage. Then, a man says girlfriend has become a nightmare.
Video.title: A Promise To Weep

Video.summary: An aunt says she lent her nephew money to fix his car, but he insists he never borrowed any money; an auto mechanic says a woman failed to provide a deposit on repairs and used his garage to store and hide her vehicle from being repossessed.
Video.title: Hide and Seek

Video.summary: First, a real life family feud unfolds. Then, a man sues for breach of contract.
Video.title: All in the Family

Video.summary: First, a sister sues her brother for $5000. Then, a woman claims a man stole her puppy.
Video.title: Oh, Brother

Video.summary: First, a dispute over the caring of horses. Then, plaintiff claims the defendant caused an accident.
Video.title: For the Love of Horses

Video.summary: Stacy claims her mom Sherry promised to support her in college. Sherry says she's jobless and can't afford her allowance.
Video.title: The Long Con

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for car damage, while he countersues for destruction of his personal property; a landlord hopes to recoup money for damages and unpaid rent.
Video.title: Love and Legal Damage

Video.summary: First, the defendant allegedly stole the title of her car. Then, an Uber driver claims her rear door was hit.
Video.title: Vexing Vehicles

Video.summary: First, Aunt sues niece for destroying car and failure to repay loan. Then, a dad sues his son for unpaid loan.
Video.title: Family Feuds

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims friend destroyed her car. Then, plaintiff claims money stolen from child’s shoebox.
Video.title: Grand Theft Shoe Box

Video.summary: A promoter claims he booked space for an event only to find out that the venue wasn't available; two huskies attack a puppy, resulting in nearly $5,000 in medical expenses, while the dogs' owner insists they are not dangerous.
Video.title: Booked, Barked, and Billed

Video.summary: First, sisters dispute over a cell phone. Then, man sues neighbor for allegedly destroying his chainsaw.
Video.title: Buzz Kill

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims defendant stole her puppy. Then, plaintiff alleges that her ex abused her.
Video.title: Puppy Love

Video.summary: A woman sues her sister-in-law over funeral costs incurred for her late brother; a woman says she agreed to lend her co-worker some cash to help him during tough times, but he refused to pay her back, saying the money was a gift and not a loan.
Video.title: Funeral Feud

Video.summary: First, a woman claims she was not paid for her services. Then, plaintiff contends damage to his windshield.
Video.title: A Rock in Hard Place

Video.summary: First, a dispute over car damages. Then, two friends attempt to sue the plaintiff for $1,500!
Video.title: When Two or More Are Gathered

Image.alt: When Two or More Are Gathered
When Two or More Are Gathered
When Two or More Are Gathered

Video.summary: First, you shouldn’t do business with your friends! Then, a woman says she was never paid for services.
Video.title: Business with Friends

Video.summary: First, a man is suing his ex-fiancée for the return of the engagement ring. Then, a botched car sale.
Video.title: A Story of Repossession

Video.summary: First, a woman claims defendent sold her a broken car. Then, a plaintiff claims unpaid lones.
Video.title: M'lady of Maladies

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims the defendant crashed into her car. Then, plaintiff is suing for unpaid rent and bail.
Video.title: Bail Outs

Video.summary: First, a dispute over damaged property. Then, a woman seeks repayment of short-term loan.
Video.title: In These Difficult Times

Video.summary: First, plaintiff sues her landlord for rent money. Then, man believes he was duped by a car seller.
Video.title: A Roach and a Lemon

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims dog mauled his cat to death. Then, woman claims she got duped for a knock off.
Video.title: Knocked off

Video.summary: First, a daughter sues her mother for unpaid bills and lost wages. Then, plaintiff sues for property damage.
Video.title: In Need of Repair

Video.summary: Sued for car vandalism and other damages, the defendant says the plaintiff is trying to commit fraud and wasting the court's time; litigants dispute unpaid bills and late fees over a water well.
Video.title: Water Well Woes

Video.summary: Two cousins find themselves embroiled in litigation over breach of contract; a couple sue their former roommate for unpaid rent, utility bills, late fees and lost wages.
Video.title: Family Ties, Broken Leases

Video.summary: First, the defendant failed to pay a personal loan. Then, a woman seeks repayment for a down payment on a car.
Video.title: Not a Charity

Video.summary: First, daughter sues her mother for wrecking her vehicle. Then, two sisters dispute car payments.
Video.title: Pain in the Cars

Video.summary: First, business partners dispute over a loan. Then, plaintiff provided legal services and is suing client.
Video.title: It's Just Business

Video.summary: A woman says her ex-fiance split without paying his share of the bills; an attempt to help a homeless single mom went awry when, the plaintiff claims, the defendant nearly burned down her kitchen.
Video.title: Charred Intentions

Video.summary: First, a woman wants reimbursement for temporary loan. Then, plaintiff claims unpaid rent and damages.
Video.title: Going Under

Video.summary: The owner of a dog who was viciously attacked by a pit bull and eventually died is now left with veterinary bills and emotionally distraught; a woman accuses her ex-boyfriend of stealing her debit card while she was incarcerated.
Video.title: All Dogs Go to Court

Video.summary: First, a pet dog was attacked by the defendant’s dog. Then, a brother sues his brother for a personal loan.
Video.title: Not So Brotherly Love

Video.summary: First, litigants seek payment for deposits. Then, a sister sues her brother for failure to pay a bond.
Video.title: Broken Bonds

Video.summary: A woman says a company damaged her custom stone floors and wants her money back; plaintiffs say the defendant's reckless driving damaged their iron fence, but he says he was trying to avoid a deer.
Video.title: A Rocky Start

Video.summary: A landlord sues his former tenants for unpaid rent and late fees; an unfinished floor remodeling job and reportedly unwanted sexual advances bring ex-friends to court.
Video.title: Remodeling Regrets

Video.summary: A woman alleges that the defendants knowingly rented her a home that was fraught with bed bugs; a marriage gone bad has an ex-wife suing her ex-husband for a multitude of expenses.
Video.title: Bugged Lease

Video.summary: First, an ex-girlfriend sues for bowling ball purchase. Then, a friend sues ex-band member.
Video.title: Bowling for Dupes

Video.summary: An unfinished construction job results in a heap of garbage, but the defendant says he did exactly what he was paid to do; a woman sues her sister for car repairs.
Video.title: Nailed It… or Failed It?

Video.summary: A hit-and-run defendant admits there was a crash but says the plaintiff failed to come to a complete stop; former friends are entangled in a legal rumble as one is suing for two lost phones, while the other is countersuing for breach of contract.
Video.title: Crash, Cash and Conflict

Video.summary: A woman says the person she hired to plan her big birthday bash dropped the ball; a man who let his co-worker use his Uber account to get to and from work says she abused the account.
Video.title: Uber Betrayal

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims ex-wife let him unpaid bills. Then, it’s a case of hit and run.
Video.title: Hit and Ruin

Video.summary: First, woman claims girl quit cheer team after begging to join. Then, a man claims girlfriend assaulted him.
Video.title: Cheer Leaver

Video.summary: First, the plaintiff claims defendant took her money. Then, a man claims he was not paid or for renovations.
Video.title: Conned Out of Love

Video.summary: A vicious dog attack reportedly left the plaintiff with over $2,000 in medical bills, but the defendant insists that his dog attacked in self-defense; a phone and property damage have two cousins in court.
Video.title: Paw and Order

Video.summary: A mother sues her daughter for an unpaid furniture loan; two friends are in court over $600.
Video.title: Chairing the Burden

Video.summary: First, man sues ex for a nose job he claims he subsidized. Then, woman claims ex stole her car after breakup.
Video.title: Nose for a Nose

Video.summary: An unpaid loan brings a woman and her grandson's ex-girlfriend to court; a woman regrets agreeing to take out a loan for her ex-boyfriend.
Video.title: Loanly Regrets

Video.summary: First, a daughter refuses to pay her mother back. Then, the plaintiff claims that her ex took luxury purses.
Video.title: The Deadbeat Bag Snatcher

Video.summary: First, woman sues for the fraudulent iPhone sale. Then, plaintiff is suing the defendant for a down payment!
Video.title: i-Fraud
